name: Microsoft Edge (Legacy) — Browsing Activity
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Legacy UWP Microsoft Edge (EdgeHTML engine) typed URL history — URL, timestamp, and visit count per typed address bar entry.
forensic_value: TypedURLs are manually entered URLs (not clicked links) — high investigative value for establishing attacker navigation intent. Only relevant on Windows 10 pre-Chromium Edge. Chromium-based Edge stores history in SQLite, not registry.
